name: Popover
description: A floating popover component for displaying rich content in an overlay with customizable triggers, placement, and interaction modes.
usage_guidelines: Use for displaying additional information or actions without navigating away.
Choose appropriate placement to avoid content overflow.
Use trigger prop to control interaction mode (click or hover).
Set modal to control focus trapping behavior.
Provide clear, concise content in popover.

placement.description: Popover position relative to trigger element.

modal.description: Enables modal behavior with focus trapping.

onOpenChange.description: Callback fired when open state changes.

styling_info.visual_description: A floating card with shadow that appears near trigger element. Includes smooth fade and scale animations. Automatically repositions to stay in viewport.

Do: Use click trigger for interactive content
Use hover trigger for quick info
Dont: Don't add extra padding to content, as it already included in the card
